raw_input:
[5.0/5] Excellent, party on brothers and sisters. [[VIDEOID:7cfc995b010d23bc7176b91f843fecfa]] Hotep and party on brothers and sisters and thank you for looking at my review of the HMPRT 80s 90s Costume, A Black Mullet Rocker Wig and Wig Cap, Black T-Shirt, Wayne’s World Baseball Cap, and Inflatable Guitar. What I like about this set it's a spoof of Wayne's World and it comes with a Wayne's World cap, a wig, T shirt and an inflatable guitar. The inflatable guitar gives a whole new meaning to the term air guitar. With this you can play Bohemian Rhapsody! “NOT” Long live, Queen.
“Wayne's World" was originally a recurring sketch from the NBC television series Saturday Night Live. It evolved from a segment titled "Wayne's Power Minute" (1987) on the CBC Television series It's Only Rock & Roll, as the main character first appeared in that show. A prototype of the Wayne character had appeared several years prior on CITY-TV in Toronto's overnight show City Limits. The Saturday Night Live sketch spawned a hit 1992 film, its 1993 sequel, and several catchphrases which have since entered the pop-culture lexicon. The sketch centered on a local public-access television program in Aurora, Illinois, hosted by Wayne Campbell (Mike Myers, the same actor from "Wayne's Power Minute"), an enthusiastic and sardonic long-haired metalhead, and his timid and sometimes high-strung, yet equally metal-loving sidekick and best friend, Garth Algar (Dana Carvey). Wayne lives with his parents and broadcasts his show "live" from the basement of their house every Friday evening at 10:30. The first "Wayne's World" sketch appeared in the 13th Saturday Night Live episode of the 1988/1989 season. The only thing I didn't like about the Cap is that it clearly looks like a woven Cap on the ad, but the Cap that I was sent is definitely a screen print which I guess is, OK? ” NOT”. I recommend my friend. Party on brothers and sisters and thank you for looking at my review. I hope it is helpful for you. If so, you can check the helpful box below, it will help me review some More. God bless you. May the rest of your life be the best of your life. O DEE thank you [5.0/5] Hilarious This costume is great! [5.0/5] Epic set get it Loved it. Got it for a waynes world costume. I am a female. Long hair so the wig cap came in handy. Hat needed some shaping.. its a soft hat not hard hat but that and the t.. perfect! Tshirt quality is like a 5-10 target t so its nice it came with it. Id buy it again! We won 2nd place in the competition. Just needed to add your own jeans [4.0/5] Party On People! What you get - A basically ready to go (just add jeans) Wayne's World Look including Waynes World Hat, Mullet Wig (with wig cap) inflatable guitar, and plain black T-Shirt.

Pros - While noone even from a distance is going to think you suddenly became Wayne from Wayne's World - this is a fun costume and brings back a lot of fun memories.

Cons - The wig is particularly cheap - but it goes under a cap so not a disaster.

Overall - for the price you would be hard pressed to get all the pieces separately so for me that counts as a win. [4.0/5] party on! excelente! [[VIDEOID:3374f8248a4d50ea0b36f2f53972ccc1]] the guitar is a small, plastic blow up, but the wig, shirt and hat are good quality. the wig hair is a bit wild and will need some brushing or even a cut to really make it look like wayne’s (i think it’s longer than wayne’s hair). it’s a good value for an easy halloween costume. could also be used to dress up as a rock and roll guitarist just by switching out the hat. [5.0/5] Shyeah, Right! Simple but effective costume This Wayne’s world costume arrived quickly and looks exactly as shown in the product images. This costume can be considered unisex and really is perfect for anyone who doesn’t like putting a crazy amount of effort into their Halloween look. Includes (1) wig cap, wig, inflatable guitar, black Wayne’s World Hat, and a single plain black tee. Everything seems to be of nice quality - the wig does tangle if not carefully handled. The guitar inflated just fine and would be easy to carry throughout the night or even to a party. Overall it’s exactly what it claims to be and I’ve been happy with it thus far. As far as the current set value of $35.99 - I do feel it would be more fairly set at $30 given the quality and quantity of items. [5.0/5] Just what I expected! No disappointment here. Everything is high-Halloween-costume-quality. The logo on the hat does have some pixelattion on the edges, but unless you are doing an EXTREME CLOSEUP, it's not too noticeable.
The shirt is a very very stretchy material, and the guitar is a good size when inflated.
The wig looks hilariously accurate, too. [3.0/5] Shuh! This Wayne's World costume set is pretty good for the value, but let's be honest. You really only need the hat and possibly the wig to complete this look. It comes with an inflatable guitar that is surprisingly cool, but I don't see it lasting the night if you start jamming out to some Queen. It also comes with a wig cap and a black t-shirt, but you can probably purchase those separately. The shirt is well made and the cap has a Velcro closure on the back. The Wayne's World logo is screen printed on the front of the cap.

It's not a bad costume at all, but it seems a bit extraneous, right? [5.0/5] Party on Wayne — Party on Garth OK, I’ll admit it… I’m a child of the 70s, and Wayne’s World came out right as I was coming of age. I loved the movie at the time, and its one of those iconic memories that people my age will identify with. Therefore, I just landed an AWESOME idea for a Halloween costume with this set.

This has all the key components to transmit yourself back in time and take on the persona of Wayne. I love it! The set looks really awesome, with the hat, the shirt, the hair, even a blow up guitar!! Just get yourself some ratty jeans, and you’ve nailed it.

Its months away from Halloween, but I can’t wait to bring some laughs to my friends when it gets here. [5.0/5] Sweet deal! Good quality Impressed by everything in this costume set. The black tee is thick cotton material and a real shirt. Fully finished off as is the hat. I wear hats frequently and this Wayne's world one has made it into my regular daily wear caps. The blow up guitar, literally air guitar, is still blown up in my kids room. Couldn't buy all these pieces separately for the price. Would recommend. Super happy with everything [5.0/5] Well made... some of it. The hat and shirt in this set are stellar. They are well made and in great materials. The wig is...questionable. absolutely costume quality, but it will do in a pinch. Great for costume parties. [4.0/5] Re-live the 80's! If you want a quick and easy costume...here it is. This kit comes with just about everything you need to transform yourself into Wayne. This kit comes with the following:

Hat: The Wayne's World signature hat is black with white lettering. Features a velcro adjustment in the back. It fits my 7 1/2 head great. With the wig cap and wig on I have to adjust it out more - which might not work if you have a larger head or a thick head of hair. The hat is good (not great) quality. I would even wear it out in public without the wig.

Wig Cap: This is made of stretchy nylon - like a stocking - and you get two in the package.

Wig: The wig comes in a hair net, and is made with synthetic materials. The wig fits easily on top of the wig cap. You do have to work a little bit with the hair to get it to lay the right way, but it's not too hard.

Vest: Surprisingly this came with a vest, not a T-shirt. The picture shows this kit is supposed to come with a black T-shirt, so there may have been a mistake. The vest is decent quality though. It's a lined, 5-button up vest with adjustment straps in the back. Fortunately I do have a black T-shirt, which is more comfortable and true to the movie.

Guitar: This is a single chamber plastic blow up guitar. Fun shaped, light weight and easy to carry around.

Overall, this is a quick and easy costume. Easily recognizable by anyone born before 1990. I had to take off a star because I got a vest instead of the T-shirt. [5.0/5] This costume was a hit Comes w every thing you need at a reasonable price. [4.0/5] Does The Job; Could Be Cheaper While this is a decent costume, it doesn't take much creativity to put it together and comes at a somewhat high price tag. It's $35 at the time of review, which comes with the shirt, wig, wig cap, guitar, and hat. None of it is overly amazing. The hat is pretty cheap while the others are as expected. The shirt is probably the best. Turns out, it's a little more than cotton. It's nice and stretchy. It does fit true to size unlike most tee shirts these days. The mullet looks decent, although you don't need a wig cap for it. It stays on just fine without it. It will make an easy, but somewhat cheap costume if you are in a bind. That said, it does the job. [5.0/5] Funny costume, brings me back to my youth. I grew up watching Waynes World so I think it will be hilarious to wear for Halloween this year. This comes with everything you need, just throw on some jeans. The wig is really shiny but I think it adds to how hilarious this is. It has a snug comfortable fit. I have a rather large head and was worried, but it fits perfectly. I cant wait to wear the hat. Best part about this costume is that half of it can be used for daily wear. [2.0/5] Not My First Choice For A Wayne Campbell Costume The pictures show a more accurate hat with stitched lettering and the globe infilled in white. The hat here is screenprinted on and it looks cheap. For over $10 less or even more you can find a more authentic looking stitched hat. The shirt is just a standard black tee, nothing you probably don't already have in your closet. The wig is a frizzy mess, couldn't wear it for more than 5 minutes before the itchiness overcame me. The guitar is just under 3 feet long which would have made it perfect for prop use, not too obnoxiously big but not too small. What ruins it is the big "ROCK N ROLL" and the big black comic style "BANG!" clip art looking graphics on it. The product pictures show a blank white guitar. Overall for the asking price you're better off getting a higher quality hat for less that you can continue wearing post-costume party and find a better prop guitar. Do not recommend. [5.0/5] Wayne’s World! Party time! Excellent! [5.0/5] Great purchase loved it! [5.0/5] Great purchase loved it!

response:
Here is a summary of the product reviews for the Wayne's World costume set:

Most customers are very happy with this costume set, giving it high ratings overall. The set includes a Wayne's World baseball cap, a black mullet wig with wig cap, a plain black t-shirt, and an inflatable guitar. Buyers appreciate that it comes with everything needed for the costume, aside from jeans, and feel it offers good value for the price compared to buying the pieces separately.

The hat and t-shirt are generally praised as the best items in the set. The shirt is noted as being good quality cotton material, and the hat is considered wearable even outside of costume use. The inflatable guitar is seen as a fun bonus, though one reviewer found it too small and another noted it lacks the dramatic rock and roll feel they wanted.

The wig receives more mixed feedback. Some find it looks hilariously accurate and fits well, while others describe it as cheap, frizzy, or difficult to style. Most agree that using the included wig cap helps keep it in place.

A couple of negative points mentioned are that the Wayne's World logo on the hat is screen printed rather than stitched, which some feel looks cheap, and that the wig can be itchy and uncomfortable over time.

Overall, most buyers recommend this set as a fun, easy, and recognizable Halloween or party costume that brings back fond memories of the classic movie and SNL sketch.
